curation_notes: Primary locations derived from the patch diff which fixes SQL injection in three methods of the sqlite3 driver (MetaColumns, metaForeignKeys, metaIndexes) by replacing string interpolation and sprintf with parameterized queries. Sibling locations identified in drivers/adodb-sqlite.inc.php (MetaColumns, MetaIndexes) and drivers/adodb-pdo_sqlite.inc.php (MetaColumns) which contain the same unparameterized table name interpolation pattern. Pre-assigned class sql-injection confirmed — the patch clearly replaces direct string interpolation in SQL with bound parameters.
